title: Add Rate Limiting to Endpoint
description: Configure rate limiting for a specific endpoint with custom thresholds.
steps: Determine appropriate rate limit (requests per minute) based on use case
Choose limiting strategy: per-IP, per-user, or per-API-key
Add endpoint-specific override in rate-limiter middleware config
Set appropriate response: 429 with Retry-After header
Add rate limit headers to response: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
Test: verify limits enforced correctly with concurrent requests
